text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for Tracen Academy's annual summer
camp, and Sakura Chiyono O is fired up from day
one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to improve and reignite the fire in
Maruzensky's engine, which has been left idle for
far too long.
